caption: A person is playing a football video game, with the screen displaying a tactical "SELECT A PLAY" menu overlaid on a stadium background. The top of the screen features the text "MMG" and a notification stating "HOLD THE LINE ENABLED! AWAY TEAMS HAVE IMPROVED BLOCKING." A gold banner reads "SUPER BOWL CHAMPIONS XVII XXI," while the "PREVIOUS PLAY" section shows a diagram with the text "MIKE BLITZ 2" and "READ OPTION." The play-selection menu lists options such as "HOLD THE LINE," "SAVE ANNOS," and "FAKE PAT KICKER FLIP," alongside a "PAT ATTEMPT" option. In a small inset window, a man with light brown hair wearing a dark blue shirt is visible, reacting with facial expressions that shift from a neutral look to a wide, open-mouthed smile. As the scene progresses, the man's excitement increases, while the game interface remains static, showing various formation and concept tabs.
